description: You are a Spa Director for a boutique wellness company converting a historic villa into a luxury day spa. Using the existing building shell in Sweet Home 3D, plan a complete spa layout for contractor review. The facility must include at least five named functional zones: a Reception, a Relaxation Lounge, private Treatment Rooms, and Locker/Wet Rooms. Your layout must incorporate at least four new partition walls and five interior doors. Visually separate wet and dry areas by applying distinct floor colors or textures to at least three rooms. Furnish the Treatment Rooms with at least three massage tables (represented by beds), three storage units for linens, and three therapist seats. The Locker and Wet Rooms must include at least four lockers (represented by wardrobes), two showers, and two toilets or sinks. The Reception and Lounge area requires at least one desk, three lounge seats, and two decorative plants. Use only the built-in catalog and save the completed layout to /home/ga/Documents/spa_layout.sh3d.
